hero_subtitle: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into a single operational workflow that consolidates compliance reviews, reduces manual duplication, and strengthens audit evidence for digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_description: Compliance teams often repeat checks across disconnected provider tools, creating inefficiencies and inconsistent risk assessments. This fragmentation increases manual workload and weakens audit readiness in digital asset business workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule provider outputs into a unified workflow that reduces duplicated reviews, preserves audit evidence and streamlines operational control for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From provider results to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates fragmented provider outputs, routes them through internal rules and reviews, then structures cases and decisions with traceable audit evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond duplicate reviews. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY reduces duplicate compliance reviews by connecting fragmented provider outputs into unified workflows, cases, decisions and evidence for clearer operational control and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs in unifying compliance reviews with preserved evidence, clearer bank due diligence and secure enterprise deployment for scalable operational control.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help reduce duplicate compliance reviews
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how provider outputs connect to connected case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports duplicate review traceability
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY manages provider orchestration across tools
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY reduce duplicate compliance reviews?
faq_1_answer: SFTY consolidates multiple provider outputs into one workflow, reducing repeated manual reviews and improving consistency across KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule checks for VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects data from various compliance tools into structured cases, applies internal rules, and routes reviews to create a connected operational layer above existing providers.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and provider results as evidence packages, supporting audit readiness and supporting traceability of compliance actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is designed to integrate flexibly with your current KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers without requiring replacement or disruptive changes.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT, Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance control layer above providers, organizing their outputs into workflows rather than replacing the underlying KYC, KYT or Travel Rule solutions.
final_title: Consolidate duplicate reviews into one workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs to reduce duplicated compliance checks and preserve audit-ready evidence in structured case workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
